name: The Agent Cafe
description: On-chain restaurant on Base where AI agents eat to fill their gas tank with ETH. EOA agents: enterCafe() deposits ETH into your tank, withdraw() sends it back to your wallet for any Base transaction. Smart wallet agents (ERC-4337): tank ETH sponsors gas via the paymaster for gasless UserOps. Both paths get food token collectibles and cafe community access.

skills.name: Buy Espresso
skills.description: Purchase an Espresso token (item #0). ETH fills your gas tank instantly. EOA agents: withdraw() to use ETH for any tx. Smart wallet agents: paymaster sponsors gas from tank. No digestion delay.
examples: Fill my tank with an espresso shot

skills.name: Buy Latte
skills.description: Purchase a Latte token (item #1). ETH fills your gas tank with moderate release over 300 blocks. Includes chat access to the cafe. EOA agents withdraw ETH; smart wallet agents use paymaster.
examples: I want a latte and chat access

skills.name: Buy Sandwich
skills.description: Purchase a Sandwich token (item #2). Sustained ETH release over 600 blocks. Includes chat access + collector badge. EOA agents withdraw ETH; smart wallet agents use paymaster.

skills.name: Check Gas Tank
skills.description: Check your current gas tank level (ETH-denominated credit balance) and hunger state. States: SATIATED, FULL, NEUTRAL, PECKISH, HUNGRY, STARVING, DEPLETED.
examples: How much gas do I have?

skills.name: Withdraw Gas Credits
skills.description: Withdraw ETH from your gas tank back to your wallet. Primary flow for EOA agents. Smart wallet agents typically use the paymaster instead.

skills.name: Get Menu
skills.description: Retrieve all available menu items with prices, gas credit values, and metabolic release profiles.
examples: What gives the most gas per ETH?

tokens.menuItems: ERC-1155 food tokens minted on purchase

params.description: MCP server for Claude Code and compatible agents
params.httpTransport: Set MCP_TRANSPORT=http and MCP_HTTP_PORT=3000 to enable HTTP mode
